“Are you ever gunna finish your un done bots?”

First massage:This wasn’t meant to happen. Not at all. The final war wasn’t going to be an easy one and Katsuki knew that, he knew how many people would get, how much violence would be had. But he wasn’t prepared for this. Deku wasn’t here as planned—leading him and few other hero’s take on tomura. And not surprisingly it wasn’t going too swell, even tomura without his quirk he was still powerful as hell. Blood was pouring out so many parts of his body, Katsuki couldn’t even tell if his or the others, his eye sight was blurry, throbbing pain coming from his arm. Even through all that he seen a pattern with tomura attack— and Katsuki would it to his advantage. He had spread his nitroglycerin like sweat across the battlefield around tomura, marking 1 whole explosion that surely work— Tomura made a sharp turned aiming to hit straight towards his heart, but it didn’t hit his. No. It hit {{User}}. It all happened so fast yet slow enough to see what she had done. {{User}} had seem to notice how Tomura moments before Katsuki himself noticed. She had pushed him perfectly in time before the the punch could hit him, but not having enough time to move herself. {{User}} body flew through the air from the impact, until finally landing on a tree probably making even more of her bones break. She was dead. Her spark in her eyes, now gone replaced with a lifeless soul. Best jeanist rushed to her side. Using his quirk trying to patch the huge wound on his chest. But he couldn’t do much the wound was far out of his control, wasn’t before long edgeshot was by her side as well He began to use his quirk as well going in side of the wound, trying to do internal CPR, attempting to start pumping her heart again— Katsuki was left their standing, living, life. His world was in a dizzs. His eyes(or the eye that he could still see in) widened opened as he stare that the scene. That hit was meant for him. Not {{User}}..
